title: EMOM Clock
description: 12-minute EMOM with dips, squats and mountain climbers for endurance

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.instructions: Quick lateral shuffles, 3-4 steps each side

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Chair dips
exercises.instructions: Hands on the edge, elbows back, lower to 90 degrees

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower thighs parallel to the floor

exercises.name: Mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: In a plank, drive knees to chest alternating quickly

exercises.name: Triceps stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm behind the head, pull the elbow with the other hand

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, bring the foot to the opposite hand, twisting

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
